description: Formalizes the membrane whitelisting step as a governed proposal. After a capability compiles and tests pass, ZAK issues a proposal.json receipt containing the capability_id, version, definition_hash, and a cryptographic signature. The human reviews and seals the proposal with one click — updating capability_snapshot.json only under that authorization. Replaces ungoverned hand-editing of the snapshot.

capability_id.description: The capability identifier being proposed for membrane admission.

compile_receipt_id.description: The receipt_id from the zak.dev.compile execution. Links the proposal to a specific compilation event.

definition_hash.description: The definition hash from the compiled definition.hash file. Must match the compiled artifact exactly.

justification.description: Human-readable justification for membrane admission. What does this capability enable and why does it belong in the membrane?

test_receipt_id.description: The receipt_id from the zak.dev.test_runner execution that verified this capability. Links the proposal to verified test passage.
